steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A: $2ab - 1$. Combining $-6 + 2$ gives $-4$, not $-1$. Eliminated.
  • Choice B: $2ab - 4$. This matches $2ab - 4$ exactly. That matches choice B — B is correct.
  • Choice C: $2ab - 5$. The constant would need to be $-5$, but it is $-4$. Eliminated.
  • Choice D: $2ab - 8$. This would follow from $2(ab-3) - 2$, not $+2$. Eliminated.
